name: claude-code-notifier
description: Get VS Code notifications when Claude Code needs your attention - never miss a question or permission request

claudeCodeNotifier.notifyOnPermissionReq.description: Notify when Claude is asking for permission to run a command.

claudeCodeNotifier.notifyOnQuestion.description: Notify when Claude needs to ask you a question before continuing.

claudeCodeNotifier.notifyOnTaskComplete.description: Notify when Claude finishes a task and is waiting for your next instruction.

claudeCodeNotifier.notifyOnSubagentStop.description: Notify when a Claude subagent finishes its task.

claudeCodeNotifier.systemNotification.description: Show an OS-level notification pop-up in addition to the VS Code notification. Works on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

claudeCodeNotifier.sound.description: Play a sound when Claude needs your attention. Works on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

claudeCodeNotifier.notificationDelay.description: Seconds to wait before playing sound and showing the OS notification. If you dismiss the VS Code popup within this time, the sound and OS notification are cancelled.

claudeCodeNotifier.suppressWhenFocused.description: Skip the system notification and sound when VS Code is already the active window. The VS Code popup will still appear.
